description: Security hooks for __PROJECT_NAME__. Deny destructive commands and secret-file reads.

beforeShellExecution.name: deny-destructive
beforeShellExecution.message: Blocked by Rule 020 / .cursor/hooks.json. This command is on the project deny-list. If you believe it is safe, write an ADR justifying the exception first.

beforeShellExecution.name: ask-on-supply-chain
beforeShellExecution.message: Supply-chain write. Confirm the package name and registry. Prefer locking versions and adding to an ADR.

beforeShellExecution.name: ask-on-sensitive-paths
beforeShellExecution.message: Editing a security-critical file. Confirm intent.

beforeReadFile.name: deny-secret-files
beforeReadFile.message: Blocked by Rule 020. Secret-like files are never read by agents in this project. If you need an env var, reference .env.example instead.

beforeWriteFile.name: deny-writing-secrets
beforeWriteFile.message: Agents do not write .env or key files. Update .env.example and let the human copy values.
